perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a blue ruffled top stands in front of a Costco logo in a warehouse setting, speaking energetically with expressive hand gestures. (2) The camera pans to a refrigerated display case filled with packaged salmon heads. (3) A close-up shows the price tag of 'Fresh Norway Salmon Head'. (4) The woman points to the products and then towards the camera, eventually clasping her hands together in a pleading motion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A female voice speaks with a very high-pitched, enthusiastic, and rapid tone. (2) Occasional sound effects like 'pops' are heard as text overlays appear. (3) The background contains a faint hum of a supermarket environment. (4) The energetic speech and rhythmic music continue until the end without breaks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '不能說的秘密 隱藏商品' (A secret hidden product) and '一年四季它都在特價' (On sale all year round) appear in large, colorful fonts. (3) '空運鮭魚頭' (Air-freighted salmon head) and '永遠在打折' (Always on sale) are used to highlight the deal. (4) '特價資訊' (Sale info) and '留言告訴我' (Tell me in the comments) serve as functional hooks for engagement.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Hidden product) -> Showcase (Salmon head deal) -> Engagement (Call for recipes)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male and 2 female shoppers visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with a black beret, a blue off-shoulder ruffled top, blue jeans, and a thin brown crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco Wholesale warehouse with industrial refrigeration units and shoppers in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature -> Community Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping tip guide, sharing a 'secret' consistent discount on salmon heads at Costco to provide value to the audience while encouraging them to comment with their own recipes to boost engagement metrics.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically highlights a product and the brand name 'Costco' while presenting the deal in a favorable light.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-talking high-energy delivery combined with variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical 'KOL' shopping vlog style intended for social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, prioritizing speed and visual hooks.
